name: react-example
description: Best AI Agent Directory, MCP Directory, AI Agent Rankings, Reviews, Comparisons, Pricing, Benchmarks, and Tutorials.

scripts.build: node scripts/generate_sitemaps.js && node scripts/generate-rss.cjs && node scripts/generate-ai-index.cjs && rm -rf public/client && vite build && mkdir -p dist/client/assets/brand && cp -R public/assets/brand/. dist/client/assets/brand/ && cp public/site.webmanifest dist/client/site.webmanifest && cp public/favicon.ico dist/client/favicon.ico && cp -R dist/client/assets/. public/assets/ && cp public/route-meta.json dist/ && cp public/contentIndex.json dist/ && cp public/content-index.json dist/ && esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --packages=external --sourcemap --outfile=dist/server.js
scripts.seo:audit: npm run generate:seo && npm run validate:slugs && npm run validate:data && npm run validate:external-links && npm run validate:assets && npm run validate:accessibility && npm run validate:content && npm run validate:jsonld && npm run validate:links && npm run validate:canonicals && npm run validate:sitemaps && npm run check:words && npm run validate:internal-links && npm run generate:reports
scripts.deploy:check: npm run seo:audit && npm run build
